'''Kethren Systems''' was an arms manufacturer.<ref name="GG2-2" /> The company had a secret agreement with [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] to be supplied with spin-sealed [[Tibanna/Legends|tibanna gas]] from [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] during the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="GG2">''[[Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin]]''</ref>
